name: Arabiyun Ana (عربيون أنا)
description: An educational mobile application designed to teach Arabic to young learners in a fun and interactive way. Featuring gamified levels, writing practice, voice recognition, and rich audio-visual content.
features: Interactive Arabic learning games with drag-and-drop mechanics.
Audio pronunciation guides and voice recording for practice.
Gamified progression system with levels and rewards.
Rich offline media support for uninterrupted learning.
my_role: Frontend Mobile Developer - Designed a fluid, gamified user interface with 60fps custom animations. Engineered a local caching layer for heavy multimedia assets to ensure the app runs smoothly without internet dependency.
